_instructions.description: Batch seed data for PLM platform. Execute steps in order — IDs from responses are needed for subsequent calls.

step1_items.description: Create all top-level and sub-assembly items

records.name: Electric Vehicle Battery Pack
records.description: 72 kWh lithium-ion battery pack assembly for EV platform

records.name: Battery Module 18S4P
records.description: Individual battery module — 18 cells in series, 4 in parallel

records.name: Battery Management System
records.description: BMS PCB — cell balancing, SOC estimation, thermal management

records.name: Cooling Plate Assembly
records.description: Aluminium liquid cooling plate for battery thermal regulation

records.name: Rear Drive Motor Assembly
records.description: 250 kW permanent magnet synchronous motor with integrated inverter

records.name: Motor Rotor Assembly
records.description: Interior permanent magnet rotor — NdFeB magnets

records.name: Chassis Frame
records.description: Skateboard platform chassis — high-strength steel + aluminium extrusions

records.name: On-Board Charger
records.description: 11 kW AC on-board charger with CCS2 DC fast-charge support

step2_revisions.description: Create initial revisions for each item. Use item IDs returned in step 1.

step3_bom_links.description: Build BOM hierarchy. Use revision IDs from step 2.

records._comment: Battery Pack Rev B contains 12 modules, 1 BMS, 1 cooling plate, 1 housing
Motor Assembly Rev A contains stator, rotor, inverter

step4_change_requests.description: Create change requests linked to items

records.title: BMS firmware update — SOC algorithm improvement
records.description: Update state-of-charge estimation algorithm to ML-based model. Reduces estimation error from ±3% to ±1%. Requires new PCB layout for additional MCU flash. Linked to BMS Rev B.

records.title: Cooling plate channel redesign for improved flow rate
records.description: CFD analysis shows hotspots on cells 14-17 under 3C discharge. Redesign serpentine channels to equalise flow. Target: max cell delta-T < 3°C at peak load.

records.title: Rotor magnet supplier qualification — secondary source
records.description: Qualify second NdFeB magnet supplier to mitigate supply chain risk. New supplier samples show equivalent magnetic properties (Br=1.35T, Hcj=2400 kA/m). Requires motor dyno validation.

records.title: OBC Rev A design freeze and release
records.description: On-board charger has completed EMC pre-compliance testing (CISPR 25 Class 5). Final DV test report attached. Ready for release to production.

records.title: Chassis frame mass reduction — topology optimisation
records.description: FEA-guided topology optimisation identifies 8 kg saving potential in front subframe nodes. Proposal to switch 4 brackets from stamped steel to HPDC aluminium.
